since_last: 37% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.78%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.65% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 37% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.78%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.78%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.88%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +4.88%, PUBM +2.43%, PLTR +1.67%, NOW +1.36%, ADBE +1.20%. Laggards: MU -4.88%, MRVL -4.34%, ARM -4.28%, LSCC -4.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.67% at $151.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
